assessorQuestions: ¿Cómo te llamas y de dónde eres?
¿Qué hay de especial en tu ciudad para los turistas?
¿En qué tipo de establecimiento te gustaría hacer tus prácticas?
¿Cómo te imaginas en diez años profesionalmente?

featuredRoom.bathroomFeature: a deep soaking bathtub with views of the city

extraFacility.name: Outdoor terrace with panoramic views of Toledo

guestQuestions: ¿Se puede visitar la catedral de Toledo desde aquí?
¿Hay servicio de habitaciones por la noche?
checklist: Use the 'dejarse sorprender por' slogan formula
Present the featured room with all details (furniture + bathroom)
Mention the shuttle service and price
Present the extra facility with hours and pricing
Answer ALL guest questions — include at least one NO answer

data.noTableSituation: No terrace tables available until 14:30 (another party is just finishing). Offer the interior dining room immediately or a complimentary tapa at the bar while they wait.

dishOfDay.name: Perdiz estofada a la toledana
dishOfDay.ingredients: partridge, onion, bay leaf, white wine, black peppercorns, olive oil
dishOfDay.cookingMethod: slow-braised on low heat for 2 hours
dishOfDay.flavourTexture: deeply flavourful, tender meat that falls off the bone, with a rich wine sauce

checklist: Greet the guests warmly at the entrance
Check reservation system — identify or seat the guests
If no table available: apologise, give waiting time, suggest alternative
Present the menu and recommend the dish of the day (with description)
Check on guests during the meal
Handle any requests or questions politely
